assertionResults.reason: Both /auth/callback (missing code) and /auth/callback?code=invalid returned HTTP 307 redirects to /login?error=auth_callback_error with no 500.
Supabase Admin generate_link produced redirect to /auth/callback with token fragment (#...) but no ?code= query param, so a valid callback code could not be obtained for the curl open-redirect check.
Unauthenticated GET /dashboard with isolated empty cookie jar returned HTTP 307 with Location: /login.
.env.local contains server-only SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (no NEXT_PUBLIC_ service-role key), and no actual service-role key value was found in downloaded client bundles.

blockers.description: Unable to produce a valid callback ?code= via Supabase Admin magic-link generation for curl testing; generated links redirect with hash fragment tokens instead.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried generate_link with options.redirect_to, top-level redirect_to, options.redirectTo, and PKCE challenge variants; all returned fragment token flow without query code.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions: 3 passed (VAL-AUTH-004, VAL-AUTH-006, VAL-AUTH-011) and 1 blocked (VAL-AUTH-005).
